archetype_reasoning: Virtually all resolved trades and most open positions involve buying NO (or YES) at 0.95+ prices — near-certainty entries collecting small premiums rather than making genuine probabilistic calls. Directionality of 1.0 across only 2 distinct markets confirms extreme concentration rather than forecasting breadth. The Trump-China visit cluster (13+ trades on same market at 0.97-0.999) is the clearest signature of systematic yield harvesting on obvious near-term outcomes.
domain_blindspots: China_Asia: concentrated near-certainty bets on Trump-China visit lost at 0.999 and 0.997 — extreme tail risk when harvesting this close to 1.0
Iran_ME: open positions suggest expansion into new domain with same near-certainty strategy, untested with resolved data
domain_summary: This trader has no demonstrated genuine forecasting edge — their 88% accuracy in both domains is almost entirely attributable to harvesting near-certain outcomes, not predictive skill. The three losses visible in recent_resolved were all at 0.95+ prices, confirming the strategy's tail risk rather than any analytical failure.
signal_weight_reasoning: Near-certainty entries (95%+ of trades above 0.95 probability) provide no signal about contested market outcomes. The trader is not expressing probabilistic views — they are collecting micro-premiums. Copying this trader's direction tells us nothing meaningful about where a market will resolve; it merely reflects what is already near-consensus. The few exceptions (UAE strike, Iran nuke, Mojtaba Khamenei at 0.34) appear isolated and may represent strategy experimentation, not genuine forecasting.

open_positions_summary: Heavy Iran_ME cluster: multiple near-certainty NO positions on Iran leadership change, US-Iran meetings, and strikes by various parties. Simultaneously holds near-certainty YES positions on Trump visiting China by May/June 2026 — a reversal from previously losing NO positions on the same theme, suggesting possible loss recovery strategy. The Mojtaba Khamenei YES at 0.344 is the only genuine forecasting-range entry. Overall thesis: collecting small premiums on low-probability geopolitical events while carrying concentrated correlated tail risk across Iran-ME.

summary: This trader is a near-pure yield harvester operating across a tiny number of markets with no demonstrated genuine forecasting ability. The 88% accuracy across both domains is an artifact of entering at 0.95-0.999 prices rather than genuine predictive skill, and the three visible losses all occurred at near-certainty entry points confirming the strategy's tail risk profile. The Trump-China visit cluster — 13+ trades on a single market — and a directionality of 1.0 across only 2 markets make this trader's signals meaningless for STR-003 signal generation. The only position worth watching is the contrarian Khamenei YES at 0.344, which stands apart from the rest of the portfolio as the sole evidence this trader may occasionally form genuine views.
